failure_inventory: UNC database path reaches sqlite persistence
accepted non-ASCII CSRF token returns 400 on exact-token write
two mixed-currency run details each return 400
two concurrent undo calls both return 200

criteria_results.C1: fail: accepted Unicode CSRF token cannot authorize a write
criteria_results.C2: fail: mixed-currency state hides retained run detail
criteria_results.C3: fail: concurrent repeated undo returns two successes

invariants.INV-6: fail: mixed-currency state hides run traceability

looks_done_but_wrong: declared tests cover only local temp paths, ASCII tokens, sequential same-facade undo, and single-currency run details

requested_fix: centralize local-path enforcement, make undo state validation and transition atomic, keep run detail independent of aggregate conflicts, and fail fast or correctly compare every accepted CSRF token
